title: Genshin Domains
description: Find special doors through your world and get into interdimensional dungeons!
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

This mod adds Domains from Genshin Impact into Minecraft, to access them you need to find doors throughout your world, they spawn randomly but the chat will let you know their coordenates. Once you find them just right-click to be teleported to the Domain. There you can start fighting by right-clicking the Key in the middle.

After you defeat your opponents a chest and an exit will spawn, just right-click the exit to return to where you were. The door you used will desappear when the challenge is completed.

##  Door Finder
 
![Door Finder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/359eefc3477abdaf1cd6e364ad7d97de2449c1df.png)

You can use this item to know the location of the current active door, if theres none it will show the locations of all the doors currently in your world.

 

## Commands

You can use the /genshindomains command to interact with the mod in some different ways, just by choosing the parameter.

**debug** - Resets all the mod's variables, hopefully fixing bugs that may occur (doesn't reset doors).

**resetNumberOfDoors** - Resets the doors in your world.

**summonRandomDoor** - Summons a door near the player.

**checkDoorCooldown** - Tells you how much time is left until the next door spawns.

**supportedModsInstalled** - Tells you if the supported mods are installed.

**numberOfMobs** - Let's you change the number of mobs that will spawn in the Domains (between 3 and 30).

**tpOut** - Teleports all players inside the domain dismension to the overworld.

 

## Compatible Mods

This is a list of mods that will have their mobs spawning in the Domains, you can click them to go to their pages:

**Zoni's Anime Weapons**

**Born in Chaos**

**Ice and Fire: Dragons**

**Mekanism Additions**

**Alex's Mobs**

**Alex's Caves**

**L_Ender 's Cataclysm**

**The Twilight Forest**

**Thermal Expansion**

**Cave Dweller Reimagined**

**Blue Skies**

**Deeper and Darker**

Not all mobs will be able to spawn, and more mods will be supported in the future.

 

## Recommend Mods

These are some mods that are not necessary but that will make the experience better:

**Lootr**

**Experimental Settings Disabler**
